hero.title: Mirsarai General Hospital
hero.subtitle: Providing Quality Healthcare Since 1985
hero.description: We are committed to providing exceptional medical care to the people of Mirsarai and surrounding areas with experienced doctors and modern equipment.

about.title: About Our Hospital
about.description: Mirsarai General Hospital has been serving the community for over 40 years with state-of-the-art facilities and qualified medical professionals.
about.mission: To provide affordable, accessible, and compassionate healthcare to all.
about.vision: To be the leading healthcare institution in Chittagong Division.

services.title: Cardiology
services.description: Advanced cardiac care including ECG, Echo, and cardiac surgery

services.title: Pediatrics
services.description: Dedicated care for infants, children, and adolescents

services.title: Orthopedics
services.description: Treatment of bone, joint, and muscle conditions

notices.title: COVID-19 Protocol Update
notices.content: All visitors are required to wear masks. Temperature check at entry.

notices.title: New MRI Machine Installed
notices.content: We are pleased to announce our new 3T MRI machine is now operational.
